category_sources: source_facts.description says strongly typed programming language that compiles to JavaScript; official PureScript website describes it as a strongly typed functional programming language compiling to JavaScript.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is purescript; official website and repository use PureScript.
docs_sources: Official PureScript website links to the documentation repository and PureScript By Example book as documentation/learning resources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/purescript/purescript, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a strongly typed language compiling to JavaScript; official website describes functional programming, compiler binaries, npm installation, and tooling.
